reason: This is a high-quality sample with a natural, curious user who asks realistic follow-up questions about unit conversions. The assistant correctly uses all three tool types (categories, list_units, convert) and provides accurate conversions (175cm ≈ 5'9", 25°C = 77°F) grounded in tool outputs. The trajectory perfectly matches the three blueprint goals in logical order. The only minor issue is that the simulated tool outputs contain parse errors, but the assistant works around this effectively and still delivers correct results. No deductions for this technical simulation artifact since the assistant's final responses remain accurate and well-grounded.
